Bulgarian split squats will humble you every single time 😭 but if you want stronger glutes, toned legs, better balance, and that sculpted lower body look… you can’t skip them. One leg at a time means no cheating, no relying on your stronger side, just pure growth and stability. They burn like crazy but the results speak for themselves 🍑 Save this workout and add it to your next leg day if you’re serious about building those glutes and leveling up your physique. #bulgariansplitsquats #glutegrowth #legdayworkout #fitnessgirl #GymTok

Selenium-um?? Please watch this video until the end because it is one of the most ridiculous I have ever seen, when you consider that this company is trying to sell us their pet food and give us confidence in it. If you cannot pronounce an ingredient in pet food, may I suggest you Google it before you decide that just because you don’t understand it, it must be bad? I genuinely cannot believe this advert was passed by this company as something they wanted as a representation of them and I think it just shows how little they think of their potential customers. #petfoodadvertising #petfood #catthevet

Boomer’s weight loss journey started the moment he entered our house. We put him on Blue Buffalo Healthy Weight dry and canned food. He was only being fed two times a day. He has already started losing weight purely because he is being fed an appropriate amount of food. We aren’t walking him yet but we are encouraging him to walk around the house and the yard. #petweightloss #overweightdog #seniordog #beagle #bluebuffalo

how to be productive! you don’t have to make the planner. timeblocking is normally done with google calendar or other planner apps, but stills works perfect on paper. if you find that you can’t fit everything in your schedule, don’t be afraid to drop one of your commitments! your free time is just as important as anything else. this “schedule” is for video purposes and not my actual one.  off note- i bought a tripod and can finally take further video shots 🤣 let’s see how this goes  #studytok #StudyTips #timeblocking #productivity #productivitytips

한 그릇만 주문해도, 커다란 양푼에서 바로 만들어주는 의정부 비빔국수 📍의정부제일시장 '영선네 잔치국수' (주소: 경기 의정부시 태평로73번길 20 서52호) 🔗네이버 지도 링크: https://naver.me/IGGYPWYs 🥢비빔국수 8천원 의정부 제일시장의 오랜 내공이 담긴 국수 맛집, '영선네'입니다. ​이곳의 인기 비결은 주문 즉시 커다란 양푼에서 사장님이 직접 손맛으로 무쳐주시는 비빔국수입니다. 한자리에서만 무려 20년 동안 변함없는 맛을 이어온 진정한 노포 국수 맛집으로, ​매일 아침부터 점심시간까지는 든든하게 한 끼 식사를 해결하러 오시는 손님들로 발 디딜 틈이 없습니다. ​아삭아삭한 식감의 콩나물이 듬뿍 올라간 비빔국수와 사장님이 직접 정성껏 담그신 열무김치의 조합은 그야말로 일품인데요🤤 입맛 당기는 매콤새콤한 비빔국수를 좋아하시는 분들이라면 꼭 한번 방문해 보세요! - Made in a Giant Mixing Bowl! The Legendary 20-Year Hand-Mixed Spicy Noodles 📍 Yeong-seonne Noodles, Uijeongbu Jeil Market (Address: 20 Taepyeong-ro 73beon-gil, Uijeongbu-si, Gyeonggi-do) 🔗 Map: https://naver.me/IGGYPWYs 🥢 Spicy Mixed Noodles (Bibim-guksu): 8,000 KRW Welcome to 'Yeong-seonne,' a noodle spot in Uijeongbu Jeil Market with years of expertise. The secret to its popularity is the spicy mixed noodles, hand-tossed by the owner in a giant mixing bowl (Yangpun) immediately after ordering. It’s a true hidden gem that has maintained the same delicious taste in the same spot for over 20 years. From early morning through lunch, it’s always packed with locals looking for a hearty meal. The combination of spicy noodles topped with crunchy bean sprouts and homemade young summer radish kimchi (Yeolmu-kimchi) is simply superb! 🤤 If you love mouth-watering, sweet, and spicy noodles, this is a must-visit spot! #서울맛집 #의정부맛집 #koreanfood #seoul #streetfood

Can you imagine what the world would be like without dentists? Any cavity or small chip in a tooth would turn into a serious problem, something you’d have to deal with using heavy forceps and tears. By the age of 30, most of us would probably be living on applesauce and soups. But thanks to dentists, orthodontists, and medical researchers, the situation has changed dramatically. Today, almost any dental issue can be treated or corrected. And what’s even more impressive - science is already getting close to growing new teeth. So yes, it’s worth simply saying: thank you to people in this profession. Because of them, we can almost not be afraid of sweets. #dentist#medicine#doctor#edit#teeth

매일 새벽 손으로 직접 만드는 수제만두, 젊은 사장님에게서 느껴지는 '할머니의 손맛' 📍망원 연만두  (주소: 서울 마포구 망원로 77 1층 연만두)   🔗네이버 지도: https://naver.me/5Kb3ejlY   🥟만두 한 판 8,500원 / 왕치즈군만두 1개 2,500원   📦택배 신청: 매주 월요일 오후 5시까지 문자 접수 (연락처: 010-5941- 7816)   망원시장의 소문난 만두 맛집 '연만두'. 많은 분이 연세 지긋한 할머니가 운영하실 거라 오해할 만큼 깊은 손맛을 자랑하는 곳입니다. 하지만 이곳의 주인공은 만두에 인생을 건 젊은 사장님이었는데요.  그 깊은 맛의 비결은 진심어린 정성에 있었습니다.  "기계는 재료를 뭉개버린다"는 철학 아래, 매일 새벽부터 나와 모든 재료를 일일이 손으로 버무리고 직접 빚으시더라구요. 재료 하나하나의 식감이 살아있는 꽉 찬 만두 속은 그렇게 사장님의 고집으로 완성됩니다.  워낙 정성껏 소량만 준비하기 때문에 금세 품절되기로 유명한데요. 방문 전 전화 주문이나 네이버 예약을 이용하시면 헛걸음 없이 바로 가져가실 수 있으니 꼭 참고하세요!   주문 즉시 튀겨주시는 치즈 군만두는 갓 튀겨낸 바삭한 식감 속에 고소하게 늘어나는 치즈와 만두 속의 조화가 그야말로 환상적입니다.. 정성과 맛, 어느 하나 빠지지 않는 망원동의 진정한 인생 만두를 만나보세요!   - Deep flavor hand-mixed every dawn: Finding 'Grandmother's Touch' in a Young Master 📍망원 연만두 'Yeon-Mandu' (77, Mangwon-ro, Mapo-gu, Seoul, Republic of Korea)   🔗 https://maps.app.goo.gl/jDhS1Q11mVTn1mBA9   'Yeon-Mandu' is a renowned dumpling spot near Mangwon Market, famous for a deep, traditional flavor that leads many to assume an elderly grandmother must be running the shop. Surprisingly, the true master behind these dumplings is a young man who has dedicated his life to this craft.   The secret to such profound flavor lies in his sincere devotion. Following his philosophy that "machines crush the ingredients' texture," he starts his day in the early hours of the dawn, hand-mixing and folding every single dumpling. This stubborn commitment is what creates the perfect filling, where the texture of each ingredient remains intact and vibrant.   Because each dumpling is made with such meticulous care in limited quantities, they are famous for selling out quickly. We highly recommend placing a phone order or using Naver Reservation before your visit to ensure you don't miss out!  Don't miss the Cheese Fried Dumplings, fried to order for a perfectly crispy texture. The harmony of the savory, melting cheese and the rich dumpling filling is simply heavenly. Come and experience a true "life-changing" dumpling in Mangwon-dong, where passion and tradition meet! 🥟 #서울맛집 #망원동 #koreanfood #seoul #streetfood

눈 오는 날 동대문 포장마차에서 먹는 즉석 짬뽕 한 그릇 눈발 날리는 동대문 먹거리장터, 포장마차 천막 안으로 들어갔습니다 아침마다 직접 반죽하고 숙성시킨 면을 주문받으면 그 자리에서 바로 뽑아주십니다 홍합을 아낌없이 넣어야 국물이 시원하다며 건네주신 짬뽕 한 그릇 사모님이 직접 담그신 김치 한 젓가락 올려 호호 불며 먹으니 얼었던 몸이 스르르 풀립니다 [동대문 먹거리장터 유진짬뽕] 📍 위치 서울 종로구 종로40길 6 (동대문역 9번 출구 도보 3분) ⏰ 영업시간 월~토 오전 10시 30분 - 오후 10시 매주 일요일 정기휴무 ※ 재료 소진 시 조기 마감 🎞️ 영상 속 메뉴 즉석 짬뽕 ₩8,000 ※ 촬영일 기준, 가격 변동 가능 - A Bowl of Fresh-made Jjamppong at a Dongdaemun Street Stall on a Snowy Day With snow flurrying in the air, I stepped into a street stall tent at Dongdaemun Meokgeori Market Every morning, they knead and rest the dough, then pull fresh noodles to order right on the spot A generous handful of mussels makes the broth refreshing and tasty, said the owner as he handed me a bowl I topped it with a bite of kimchi the owner's wife made herself, blew on it, and my frozen body melted away [Dongdaemun Meokgeori Market Yujin Jjamppong] 📍 Location 6 Jongno 40-gil, Jongno-gu, Seoul, South Korea (3-min walk from Dongdaemun Station Exit 9) ⏰ Opening Hours Mon-Sat 10:30 AM - 10 PM Closed every Sunday ※ May close early when ingredients run out 🎞️ Featured in the video Fresh-made Jjamppong ₩8,000 ※ Price as of filming date, subject to change #tiktokfood #koreanfood #streetfood #mukjja

#mascara                                    Un mascara est un produit de maquillage destiné à être appliqué sur les cils afin de les allonger, les épaissir, les recourber et intensifier le regard. Il se présente généralement sous forme liquide ou crémeuse, contenu dans un tube avec une brosse applicatrice. Le mascara permet de donner plus de volume et de définition aux cils en les colorant, le plus souvent en noir, mais aussi en brun ou en couleurs plus originales. Selon sa formule et la forme de la brosse, il peut offrir différents effets : naturel, volumineux, allongeant ou recourbant. Facile à utiliser, il est un élément essentiel du maquillage des yeux, mais reste temporaire et s’enlève avec un démaquillant adapté.                     #lashes #prt #fyp #foryoupagе

#mascara  Le mascara est un produit cosmétique destiné à maquiller les cils en les allongeant, les épaississant, les recourbant ou en intensifiant leur couleur afin de mettre en valeur le regard. Il se présente généralement sous forme liquide ou crémeuse, appliqué à l’aide d’une brosse spécifique, et contient des pigments, des cires et des agents fixateurs permettant d’améliorer l’apparence des cils tout en assurant une bonne tenue du maquillage.

반세기, 50여년 동안 모든 걸 직접 손으로 만드는 의정부 함흥냉면 📍흥미관  (주소: 경기 의정부시 태평로73번길 20 제일시장 다동 63호) 🔗네이버 지도 링크: https://naver.me/xQNb7Lqr 🧊비빔냉면 9천원 ⏰매일 9시~20시 의정부 제일시장에서 50년 넘는 동안 함흥냉면의 자존심을 지켜오고 있는 ‘흥미관’입니다. ​이곳의 냉면이 특별한 이유는 요즘 시대에 정말 보기 드문 ‘수제 반죽’ 방식을 고집하기 때문인데요.  사장님이 직접 반죽하고 바로 뽑아낸 면발은 기성품과는 차원이 다른 쫄깃하고 탱글한 식감을 자랑합니다. ​특히 육수부터 비빔 양념, 고명에 들어가는 모든 재료를 사장님이 직접 정성으로 만드시는데요.  실제로 먹어보니 과하게 달거나 맵거나 짜지 않고, 모든 맛이 조화롭게 어우러진 깊은 ‘손맛’ 그 자체였습니다! ​날이 점점 더워지고 여름이 다가오니 시원하고 쫄깃한 이 집 냉면이 자꾸만 생각나네요. 진정한 노포의 내공이 담긴 냉면 맛집을 찾으신다면 꼭 한 번 방문해 보세요! - 50 Years of Tradition! The Legendary Handmade Cold Noodles 📍 Heungmigwan, Uijeongbu Jeil Market (Address: Da-dong 63, 20 Taepyeong-ro 73beon-gil, Uijeongbu-si, Gyeonggi-do) 🔗 Map: https://naver.me/xQNb7Lqr 🧊 Spicy Mixed Cold Noodles (Bibim-naengmyeon): 9,000 KRW ⏰ Hours: Daily 9:00 AM – 8:00 PM Welcome to 'Heungmigwan,' a place that has proudly preserved the tradition of Hamhung Naengmyeon for over 50 years in Uijeongbu Jeil Market. What makes this place special is its insistence on the "handmade dough" method, which is rare to find these days. The noodles, freshly kneaded and pressed by the owner, boast a chewy and bouncy texture that is on a whole different level from factory-made ones. From the broth to the spicy seasoning and toppings, every ingredient is crafted by hand with great care. The taste is perfectly balanced—not too sweet, spicy, or salty—offering the deep flavor of true craftsmanship. As the days get warmer, you'll find yourself craving these refreshing and chewy noodles. If you're looking for an authentic, time-honored noodle spot, this is it! #서울맛집 #의정부 #koreanfood #seoul #streetfood

It‘s been a year since I posted this video and you won’t believe the months I had after that. Since a few of you asked about my exams — I will have to retake. Am I disappointed? Yeah. Surprised? Tbh yeah. I missed 2 points to pass so it felt like a bigger loss than anticipated. I know I have been telling myself and you that this would happen from the start but when confronted with this kind of failure it hit different after all. I’ve never had to face this type of failure in my life before so I really needed time to work through this, and face the consequences of my actions. Some of you may think that it’s because I didn’t prioritize studying seeing my activity on social media but honestly? Social media was the one thing that motivated me, and I wouldn’t have studied that much without it. That being said I probably won’t make study videos or videos in general anymore because my whole family is pretty superstitious and believe I shouldn’t share so much. I feel conflicted but lean towards listening to their advice. I enjoyed making videos so much and feel sad that this is probalby coming to an end. I’ve always been proud of being honest and transparent about even the negative aspects about my life, and especially my education so I wanted to share this with you. I hope each and everyone of you reaches your goals and dreams.  #studytok
